the task is to calculate the total amount of money that can be earned by a person who works 250 hours a week, assuming a weekly income of $100. this involves determining the number of weeks in a year and multiplying it by the weekly income. the person works 5 days a week, and each day they work 50 hours. the total number of weeks in a year is 52. multiplying 52 by 50 hours gives 2600 hours per year. dividing 2600 by 250 gives 10.4 weeks. multiplying 10.4 weeks by $100 gives $1040. this calculation shows that the person can earn $1040 per year.
